title: linaria viscosa f. flava
intro: Linaria viscosa f. flava, also known as Yellow Sticky Toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Linaria viscosa f. flava include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
